old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-c2lt","title":"propagation.py: PropagationModel missing validation for n and d0_m parameters","description":"File: python/src/lichen/sim/propagation.py
Lines: 53-79, 81-100, 156-176

PropagationModel does not validate that n (path loss exponent) and d0_m (reference distance) are positive, leading to ZeroDivisionError in several methods.

Issue 1 - n = 0:
```python
def max_range(self, tx_power_dbm: float, *, sensitivity_dbm: float = SENSITIVITY_SF10) -> float:
    exponent = (tx_power_dbm - self.pl0_dbm - sensitivity_dbm) / (10.0 * self.n)  # ZeroDivisionError
    return self.d0_m * math.pow(10.0, exponent)
```

Issue 2 - d0_m = 0:
```python
def path_loss(self, distance_m: float) -> float:
    ...
    return self.pl0_dbm + 10.0 * self.n * math.log10(distance_m / self.d0_m)  # ZeroDivisionError
```

Failure scenario:
```python
model = PropagationModel(n=0)
model.max_range(14.0)  # ZeroDivisionError

model = PropagationModel(d0_m=0)
model.path_loss(100.0)  # ZeroDivisionError
```

Fix: Add __post_init__ validation:
```python
def __post_init__(self) -> None:
    if self.n <= 0:
        raise ValueError(f"Path loss exponent n must be positive, got {self.n}")
    if self.d0_m <= 0:
        raise ValueError(f"Reference distance d0_m must be positive, got {self.d0_m}")
```","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T17:05:46.988074Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T17:05:46.988103Z"}

new_value: Added __post_init__ validation + tests + docs. Fixed all associated codereview P0-P4 findings for propagation.py (formatting, docstrings, style). Ran ruff check/format, pytest (30/30 + full sim 799 pass), 3 independent review passes with zero open findings. All clean. Commit dd28fc3bd.
